summary: Sprint stalled. Both #1182 (agent-identity chicken-and-egg) and #1139 ($(date) command scanner) remain unstarted. Root cause: Swarm P0 (#1186) confirms kernel-sr worktrees (kernel-sr-3130733, kernel-sr-3169888) have been dead for 28h — no commits, no live processes. These are the agents assigned to the sprint. Escalating to ops/director: kernel-sr agents must be requeued before sprint progress is possible. 0 kernel squad PRs open. 0 governance denials. All 4394 tests passing from last QA run.

Requeue kernel-sr agents for issues #1182 and #1139
Resolve cron collisions in server/schedule.json (2 groups: 0 6 * * *, 45 */6 * * *)
Address 133 enabled agents vs 32 max_workers oversubscription
